summary: Verified Shelfsort reset-state + wipe-library feature end-to-end against the live preview backend and via Playwright on the Account page. 14/14 backend HTTP tests pass; 4/4 frontend interaction scenarios pass. No regressions or issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Spec compliance: both endpoints correctly require auth (verified 403 without session), reset-state returns 400 when no flags set, wipe-library returns 400 on wrong phrase and 422 when 'confirm' field missing — exactly as the PRD describes.

Note (informational, not a bug): backend stores confirm phrase as 'DELETE_EVERYTHING' (underscore) but the UI prompt asks the user to type 'DELETE EVERYTHING' (with a space). The frontend translates between them — works correctly, but the two-phrase divergence is a small footgun for any future endpoint consumer reading code without the UI; consider documenting in the endpoint docstring or accepting both.
books.py is now 3727 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into route modules (reading, library, reset/admin, bulk) for maintainability. Not blocking.
test_credentials: Ephemeral users created on-demand via POST /api/auth/register (password 'hunter2pw_test', random email). Cookie session_token persists in the browser/requests context.
seed_data_creation: None — each test class registers its own fresh user via /api/auth/register so the suite is hermetic and never touches existing data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite for reset-state + wipe-library lives at /app/backend/tests/test_reset_and_wipe_e2e.py (14 tests, ~2s runtime, hits the live preview URL). Frontend test ids verified: reset-state-card, danger-zone-card, reset-state-btn, wipe-library-btn, reset-opt-{reset_progress,reset_tags,reset_smart_shelves,reset_versions}. UI flow uses window.confirm for reset and window.prompt expecting the literal string 'DELETE EVERYTHING' (space, not underscore) — the frontend converts to underscore form before POSTing.
verified_scenarios: POST /api/books/reset-state without flags → 400 ('Pick at least one thing to reset.')
POST /api/books/reset-state with all 4 flags → 200, returns all 5 counters
POST /api/books/wipe-library {confirm:'delete_everything'} (wrong case) → 400 with detail mentioning DELETE_EVERYTHING
GET /api/books after wipe → empty list (data persistence verified)
UI: /account renders both cards + 4 reset checkboxes + 2 action buttons with correct data-testids
UI: clicking reset-state-btn with no boxes checked → no API call (client-side rejection)
UI: checking reset_tags + clicking → window.confirm dialog → POST /api/books/reset-state payload {reset_progress:false,reset_tags:true,reset_smart_shelves:false,reset_versions:false} → 200
UI: wipe-library-btn → window.prompt; typing 'nope' → no API call
UI: wipe-library-btn → window.prompt; typing 'DELETE EVERYTHING' → POST /api/books/wipe-library with {confirm:'DELETE_EVERYTHING'} → 200 → redirect to /library showing 'No books just yet'
